programme.title: The Blello Show
programme.desc: Join Kyle, Lyds, Extra Bear, and Stu as they share with you some cool vids, catchy catch phrases crazy challenges, things you can do in three minutes, and other random stuff to make your life awesome.

programme.title: Arise Kids TV
programme.desc: ARISE Kids TV is jam packed full of faith and fun delivered by your favourite friends! Arise Kids TV believes in the next generation aims to inspire, connect and empower kids to follow Jesus and love life.

programme.title: Ryan Defrates: Secret Agent
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates is a young spy with a whole lot to learn. One day he's paired with a very unlikely partner, his mum. She knows more about shopping than solving crime, but her wisdom and kindness somehow seem to save the day.

programme.title: Kids Beach Club
programme.desc: Join the Beach Club Kids as they navigate life, explore character lessons, and have a blast playing memorable games while discovering God through the pages of His Word, the Bible.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Having business goals and the strategic plan to get there is essential to working towards success. However, many businesses fail because whilst there is a goal, steps aren't being taken to execute.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: Shame is the leading factor that holds people back in changing their own story. If we don't confront our shame whether it be in regards to our mistakes, failures or self esteem, it perpetuates destructive behaviours.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Healing And Restoration For Your Mind
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: HumanKind
programme.desc: In the vibrant community of Sunshine Butterflies, professional chefs Nick and Sarah Hooper are cooking up more than just meals. They're using their culinary expertise to empower individuals with disabilities.

programme.title: County Rescue
programme.sub-title: Stuck Between a Hero and a Griffin
programme.desc: The team celebrates Tim's solo save. Tensions rise with Tim's success, Duke and Dani's struggles continue, and Chief Scotty faces a dilemma on who gets the job.

programme.title: The Wedding Veil Inspiration
programme.desc: Emma's plans get thrown off course when Paolo returns to Italy to take care of his father and she discovers a new passion for making art accessible to all.

programme.title: Branching Out
programme.desc: To help build a family tree, single mom Amelia tracks down her daughter's biological father. It becomes a journey of trust, love, and discovering the meaning of family.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.sub-title: Aduk's Story - Lost Children of Jonglei Scholarships
programme.desc: Celebrating people and organisations across Australia who make the world a better place. This week we see Lost Children of Jonglei Scholarships and communities that make a difference.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The Postables embark on a road trip to locate a talented young singer/songwriter hiding from her past. As they track down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help prepare him.

programme.title: For the Lost
programme.desc: For the Lost is a unique documentary series that follows one of a kind missionary band 'No Longer Music' on their tour through much of Europe and the Middle east.

programme.title: Dream: Live with Purpose, Learn to Dream
programme.sub-title: From Grief to Purpose with Pau Yin
programme.desc: Dream is a documentary series featuring the stories of diverse people from around the globe, who found purpose when they embraced their God-given dream.

programme.title: The Good Neighbour
programme.desc: The Good Neighbour is a docuseries that explores the complexities of poverty and challenges viewers to think about what it means to be a 'good neighbour.'.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: Where Do We Go From Here?
programme.desc: Dr. David Jeremiah and Sheila Walsh discuss how the events of today relate to biblical prophecy in this special interview.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Battle for Self-Control/Making Wise Decisions
programme.desc: Dr Stanley tackles important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, believing the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: An American in Austen
programme.desc: Harriet thinks that no man can compare to Mr Darcy, is transported into Pride and Prejudice and gets an chance to find out. Will the fantasy she's chasing get in the way of her real-life happy ending?

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: One Winter Proposal
programme.desc: Cara & Ben return to the resort where they fell in love hoping she'll reconnect with Ben's friend Sean. Cara finds a receipt, leading her to expect a proposal, but a misunderstanding may ice his plan.

programme.title: One Perfect Wedding
programme.desc: With Cara & Ben's work commitments keeping them so busy, they decide they can't postpone their nuptials any longer.

programme.title: Helping Hands
programme.desc: Celebrating the people and organisations across Australia who make the world a better place. This week we see the KYUP! Project and our panel discusses different ways to show we care. helpinghands.tv.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.sub-title: The World Outside Your Window Pt-1
programme.desc: With a vision for a church that is life-changing and uplifting, Glorious Gospel Church and their values are based firmly in the bible.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church, with a mission to 'empower a generation to win a generation' and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Final Prophecy_The Triumph of the Gospel
programme.desc: Even as demonic forces work against us, God is working for us. He has ultimate power and will deliver us in His time.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Grace for Times of Trouble/ Guided by God
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley

programme.title: Home is Where the Heart Is

programme.title: Everytown Downunder
programme.desc: Follow Australia's most travelled music evangelist, Steve Grace and his team on a 25,000km road trip from bush to beach, performing 78 evangelical concerts and experiencing everything Australia has to offer.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: How we choose to see adversity determines how we navigate it. This episode highlights the importance of facing adversity with optimism and hope for the future. With guest Monika Siemonek.

programme.title: Be Great. Do Good
programme.desc: Experiencing failure of some kind is an unavoidable part of business. Expecting it to come your way at some point - big or small - is an important part of building business success.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: The Power of Short Prayers: Short Prayers that Will Change Your Life
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Final Prophecy_The Triumph of the Gospel
programme.desc: Even as demonic forces work against us, God is working for us. He has ultimate power and will deliver us in His time.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham over 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Got health questions, ladies? You're not alone! Dr. Axe joins us to share foods that help women grow stronger, ways to support healthy hormones, and simple steps to feel your best-inside and out.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Bible Land Passages
programme.sub-title: Shiloh - The Place where God Once Dwelt
programme.desc: Read about places like Beersheba, Jericho, Jerusalem, Caesarea, and cities surrounding the Sea of Galilee, and discover that those places exist just as the Bible describes.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: The famous Warrior-King, Charles the Great, better known as Charlemagne. Throughout the European dark ages he conquered and built the largest Empire in Europe after fall of the Western-Roman Empire.

programme.title: Everyone: Amsterdam 23
programme.desc: This 3 day conference held in the Netherlands in 2023 was packed with many great speakers around the world. All with one heart and mission to reach EVERYONE worldwide with Christ.

programme.title: The Incredible Journey
programme.sub-title: Ophir - The Hunt for Solomon's Gold Mines
programme.desc: Gary Kent is passionate about sharing the good news of Christ and preparing people for the soon coming of Jesus, offering Biblical answers to life's questions.

programme.title: OK TV
programme.desc: Brendon and Cathie have poured their 30 years of experience with kids in schools and in ministry and the great goals of the local church into a energetic show that will engage the next generation.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible. The kids have questions and an ever-expanding cast of surprising and often bizarre visitors is on hand to help them navigate their journey through the scriptures.

programme.title: TV One Life
programme.desc: Between the humour, music and unfiltered ministry, the message is clear, "God can change your life"! Fasten your seatbelts for this roller coaster ride of a show!

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.sub-title: Winning the Battle, Before it begins
programme.desc: What do you see when you look at your giant? Partner with God's vision and declare the victory over your future before the fight begins.

programme.title: A Very Tall Man
programme.desc: Gary Hoogvliet, a very tall man, interviews interesting folk, not quite as tall as he, but nevertheless with fascinating and inspiring stories to tell.

programme.title: Three Chairs
programme.desc: A talk show celebrating the art of good conversation. Hosts grapple with topics like dating, phone addiction, parenting, and gender equality. Three Chairs will make you think and smile.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: The town prepares for the Governor's black-tie ball, while still reeling from true intentions of Union City Holdings, Lucas decides to try to sway the Governor to their side.

programme.title: Behind the Sash
programme.desc: Highlighting environmental organisation "Eco Barge" the ladies travel to far North Queensland and meet Libby, a powerhouse Aussie babe cleaning up the Great Barrier Reef in the Whitsunday region.

programme.title: Living and Launching
programme.sub-title: Facing the Fears, and the Family
programme.desc: Terrence and Emma visit their parents for the last time, and there are some pretty big concerns about their safety.

programme.title: A Fantail Journey
programme.desc: This series showcases a variety of uniquely Christian Kiwi content produced at Fantail Studios. Jared shares his heart behind them and the call that God has for each of us in sharing testimonies.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Healing And Restoration For Your Mind Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: Grace for Times of Trouble/ Guided by God
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as personal crises and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God, a belief strongly reflected in his teaching.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Got health questions, ladies? You're not alone! Dr. Axe joins us to share foods that help women grow stronger, ways to support healthy hormones, and simple steps to feel your best-inside and out.

programme.title: Letters from Mother Teresa
programme.desc: This movie explores the life of Mother Teresa through letters she wrote to her longtime friend and spiritual advisor, Father Celeste van Exem over a nearly fifty-year period.

programme.title: Fragrance of Faith
programme.desc: Witness individuals who risk their lives and lost loved ones. See God move in extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Planetshakers TV
programme.desc: Russell and Sam Evans are the senior pastors of Planetshakers City Church, with a mission to 'empower a generation to win a generation' and Planetshakers TV showcases weekly teaching and music.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In Lessons at the Well, Pastor Bayless dives into six biblical stories to show how you can move from strife, envy, and accusation to peace and fruitfulness.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham over 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.sub-title: The Power of Living Mercy Pt 1
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is the Catholic Guy. His presentations will uplift, inform and challenge you to move to higher level of faith and life. He will leave you knowing where you want to go and what to do next.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: Healing And Restoration For Your Mind Pt 1 of 4
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God.

programme.title: Veggie Tales
programme.sub-title: Larryboy and the Fib from Outer Space
programme.desc: After accidentally breaking his dad's prized collector's plate, Junior Asparagus covers up the accident. When he tells too many fibs, Junior learns that God wants us always to tell the truth.

programme.title: Deditos
programme.desc: This quirky kids show introduces children to classic stories from the Old Testament using finger puppets.

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: Travel back in time to join Dr Billy Graham and his crusade team at the events that changed the lives of thousands around the world.

programme.title: Holy Rollin'
programme.desc: Get a feel for the rugged sunburnt countryside and the people of the outback as Nick and Yvette Wynne, the motorcycle missionaries, traverse 20 000 km in 3 months riding around Australia.
